name: m14_infold_toggle
drl: rule W when accumulate( E(tag == "x", $t : ts) over window:time(150ms); $c : sum($t) ) then end
_finding: CEP A2 windowed-accumulate (D-154/D-155): an IN-fold member toggled out-and-back in one epoch with no mask write is a COMPLETE no-op (no fire at all): the intermediate alpha-fail state never evaluates.
